meta.purpose: Automation small-batch research log for PL Commentary Bank. This file records source-backed findings before any destructive or broad database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Only rows with explicit official/high-trust source support may later be promoted to data/database.json. Ambiguous identity or incomplete result context must remain outside confirmed histories. Current-event Numata rows are event results, not prior histories for the same event-relative view.

primarySourcesChecked: HPA 2026 Numata Bench Press A/B/C result速報 PDF
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting result PDF
batchScope.openPrCheck: PR #48 was open and concerns event-relative display logic only; this batch adds an isolated research log and does not touch app layout, runtime logic, database.json, or research-candidates.json.
